description: Registry of source scans and widening search strategies for the AI dystopia quotes corpus.

strategies.label: Baseline corpus and direct source pages
strategies.notes: Initial research used direct quote pages and metadata pages for the first corpus pass.

strategies.label: Search-engine classics broadening
strategies.notes: Widen title discovery around canonical literary and cinematic AI dystopia works.

strategies.label: Recognizable classics pass
strategies.notes: Prioritize high-recognition AI and robot works that mainstream sci-fi audiences are likely to know before pushing deeper into the long tail.

strategies.label: Quote-index harvest pass
strategies.notes: Expand the quote board by mining already-aggregated quote pages for recognizable AI and sci-fi works before pushing deeper into long-tail discovery.

strategies.label: Quote-hint follow-up pass
strategies.notes: Track quote-aggregation and transcript-style sites as hint surfaces for follow-up mining while keeping final candidate capture anchored to more stable quote-index pages.

strategies.label: Gemini user-provided candidate intake
strategies.notes: Merge a user-provided 100-candidate Gemini list into intake and dedupe concrete source works into the discovery queue while keeping quote verification separate.

strategies.label: Catalog and index pass
strategies.notes: Push title discovery through library and reader-catalog surfaces.

strategies.label: AI-assisted broadening
strategies.notes: Use LLM-assisted ideation and adjacency prompts to widen the long tail of candidate works.

strategies.label: Community and fandom pass
strategies.notes: Look for overlooked titles, recurring quote threads, and cross-media recommendations.

strategies.label: Long-tail cleanup pass
strategies.notes: Catch older or less mainstream material after the main discovery passes are exhausted.

strategies.label: Deep long-tail pass
strategies.notes: Final widening pass for overlooked titles, sequel chains, and edge-case AI dystopia works.

scanned_sources.label: IMDb Artificial Intelligence Interest Page / Top Rated Movies
scanned_sources.notes: Useful as a recognizability screen for mainstream AI films. Visible top-rated anchors include The Matrix, Terminator 2: Judgment Day, 2001: A Space Odyssey, Metropolis, The Terminator, and Blade Runner. Use this as a canon filter, not as an automatic import list, because the page also includes many non-dystopian AI titles.

scanned_sources.label: AFI's 10 Top 10 - Science Fiction
scanned_sources.notes: Use as a recognizability and film-canon screen. Relevant AI-adjacent anchors include 2001: A Space Odyssey, Blade Runner, The Terminator, and Metropolis.
